rule_metadata.author: Pawel Mazur
rule_metadata.title: Steganography Unzip Hidden Information From Picture File

rules.rule_text:
title: Steganography Unzip Hidden Information From Picture File
id: edd595d7-7895-4fa7-acb3-85a18a8772ca
status: test
description: Detects extracting of zip file from image file
references:
- https://zerotoroot.me/steganography-hiding-a-zip-in-a-jpeg-file/
author: Pawel Mazur
date: 2021-09-09
modified: 2022-10-09
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1027.003
logsource:
  product: linux
  service: auditd
detection:
  commands:
    type: EXECVE
    a0: unzip
  a1:
    a1|endswith:
    - .jpg
    - .png
  condition: commands and a1
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
